qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_liquidacion as ID, t.c_liquidacion as CODE, t.d_titulo as TEXT, t.oi_empresa as PID, SEC.policy FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_liquidacion LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.l_simulacion = 1 and t.oi_liquidacion={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_empresa as ID, t.c_empresa as CODE, t.d_empresa as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.EMPRESA\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_empresa as ID, t.c_empresa as CODE, t.d_empresa as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.EMPRESA\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_empresa={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_liquidacion as ID, t.c_liquidacion as CODE, t.d_titulo as TEXT, t.oi_empresa as PID, SEC.policy FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_liquidacion LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.l_simulacion = 1 and t.c_liquidacion={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND t.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_empresa as ID, t.c_empresa as CODE, t.d_empresa as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.EMPRESA\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_liquidacion as ID, t.c_liquidacion as CODE, t.d_titulo as TEXT, t.oi_empresa as PID, SEC.policy FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_liquidacion LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.l_simulacion = 1 and t.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_empresa as ID, t.c_empresa as CODE, t.d_empresa as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.EMPRESA\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('select t.oi_empresa from LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as t where t.oi_liquidacion={#SOURCE:@ID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_liquidacion as ID, t.c_liquidacion as CODE, t.d_titulo as TEXT, t.oi_empresa as PID, SEC.policy FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_liquidacion LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.l_simulacion = 1 and t.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW
